heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1444 Authorization of appropriations
text: For the purpose of carrying out this subchapter, there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2005 through 2010.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1444, , as added , , ; amended , , ; , , , which related to the Federal Interagency Coordinating Council, was repealed, as such section was in effect on the day before , by , , .Pub.
